---
title: "Decomputing"
author: "Dan McQuillan"
date: "2024-06-11"
date-added: "2026-04-15"
categories: [AI, technology-critique, politics, decomputing]
status: to-read
url: "https://www.danmcquillan.org/decomputing.html"
---

A talk given at the 2nd Ecology of AI Workshop (ECAI 2024) on the concept of decomputing — moving away from computation as the dominant paradigm.

[Read the full article →](https://www.danmcquillan.org/decomputing.html)
